name: deprecation lifecycle: /migrate-rule appends supersession entry to ADRs that referenced the old rule id (per W-4 ADR superseding chain)
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf "# ADR\nReferences rule g-old-001 for...\n" > docs/adr/2026-05-04-x.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" g-old-001 --to g-new-001 --update-adrs --tree "$PWD/tree" && grep -E "Superseded.*g-new-001" docs/adr/2026-05-04-x.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-old-001, name: g-old-001, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: true, replaced_by: [g-new-001], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
  - {id: g-new-001, name: g-new-001, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [g-new-001]
all_set: [g-old-001, g-new-001]
' > tree/google/x.yaml
